transcript: Speaker A (Robot): ನನ್ನ ಕೈ ಹಿಡಿ. Hold my hand. [Hold my hand. Hold my hand.] Speaker B (Woman): Hold my hand. Speaker A (Robot): ತಾಳ್ಮೆಯಿಂದ ಇರು. Have patience. [Have patience. Have patience.] Speaker B (Woman): Have patience. Speaker A (Robot): ಮೇಲೆ ಹೋಗಿ. Go upstairs. [Go upstairs. Go upstairs.] Speaker B (Woman): Go upstairs. Speaker A (Robot): ಹೋಗಿ ಮಲಗಿ. Go to bed. [Go to bed. Go to bed.] Speaker B (Woman): Go to bed. Speaker A (Robot): ನಾನು ನಿನ್ನ ಮೇಲೆ ಕೋಪಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದೇನೆ. I am angry with you. [I am angry with you. I am angry with you.] Speaker B (Woman): I am angry with you. Speaker A (Robot): ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ. I don't know. [I don't know. I don't know.] Speaker B (Woman): I don't know. Speaker A (Robot): MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. ಅದು ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಮಯ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ಸ್ಪೀಕಿಂಗ್, ಗ್ರಾಮರ್, ಸೆಂಟೆನ್ಸಸ್, ಸರಿಯಾದ ಪದಗಳ ಬಳಕೆ ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ ಪ್ಲೇಸ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ. [Learn English by speaking with me in Kannada on the MySivi app. That too for just one rupee. Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentences, correct word usage, all in one place.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: "ನನ್ನ ಕೈ ಹಿಡಿ" ["Hold my hand"], "Hold my hand.", "ತಾಳ್ಮೆಯಿಂದ ಇರು" ["Have patience"], "Have patience.", "ಮೇಲೆ ಹೋಗಿ" ["Go upstairs"], "Go upstairs.", "ಹೋಗಿ ಮಲಗಿ" ["Go to bed"], "Go to bed.", "ನಾನು ನಿನ್ನ ಮೇಲೆ ಕೋಪಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದೇನೆ" ["I am angry with you"], "I am angry with you.", "ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ" ["I don't know"], "I don't know.", "MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ" ["Learn English by speaking with me in Kannada on the MySivi app"], "ಅದು ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ" ["That too for just one rupee"], "Sale Ends Today", "UNLOCK EVERYTHING", "3 days for ₹30 ₹1", "MySivi Pro Benefits", "24/7 Personal AI English Teacher", "500+ Lessons", "Start Trial at ₹1", "ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಮಯ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ" ["Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want"], "speaking", "grammar", "sentences", "ಸರಿಯಾದ ಪದಗಳ ಬಳಕೆ" ["Correct word usage"], "ಎಲ್ಲವೂ ಒಂದೇ ಪ್ಲೇಸ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ" ["All in one place"], "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: An AI robot demonstrates English translation practice with a Kannada speaker. The ad promotes the MySivi app's features, offering a 3-day trial for just 1 rupee. It concludes with a call to action to install the app.
